quotes.text: Antifragility is beyond resilience or robustness. The resilient resists shocks and stays the same; the antifragile gets better.
Wind extinguishes a candle and energizes fire. You want to be the fire and wish for the wind.
The fragile wants tranquility, the antifragile grows from disorder.
A Black Swan is an event with the following three attributes: rarity, extreme impact, and retrospective predictability.
Never trust anyone who doesn't have skin in the game. Without it, fools and crooks will profit and their mistakes will never come back to haunt them.
If you have optionality, you don't have much need for what is commonly called intelligence, knowledge, insight, skills, and these complicated things that take place in our brain cells.
The learning of life is about what to avoid. You reduce most of your personal risks of accident thanks to a small number of measures.
In Extremistan, inequalities are such that one single observation can disproportionately impact the aggregate.
Fragility implies more to lose than to gain, equals more downside than upside, equals unfavorable asymmetry.
The main thing is to not go bust. Survival first, then performance.
The barbell strategy is about having a mix of extremely safe assets and highly speculative ones, with nothing in between.
Take the roundabout path to profit. Immediate gratification in markets often leads to ruin.
Market crashes are opportunities for those who have prepared with tail hedges.
